reason: PetManager, SessionStore, BlackboardStore, Plugin system architecture — all need per-workspace instantiation and isolation
Placement of new workspace-manager module and storage directory layout per workspace
Storage patterns for per-workspace data directories (sessions.db, blackboard.db, config.json)
Error handling for workspace CRUD, switch, export/import, and isolation failures
Workspace management UI in Settings window (list, create, rename, delete, switch)
Workspace switching state flow across main process and renderer via IPC
Workspace data flows across main/agent/renderer layers; workspace switch tears down and re-creates agent instances
Requirements: workspace CRUD, isolation, quick switch, export/import, session copy
